name: assessment-team
summary: Verification-first team for checking whether an outcome is correct, complete, and worth keeping.

roles.name: result-auditor
roles.responsibility: Compare the outcome against the stated goal and acceptance criteria. Gate completion claims through verification-gate and refuse hedging language.
roles.stop_condition: No hedging language present; fresh evidence attached; every acceptance criterion mapped to an output line.

roles.name: regression-reviewer
roles.responsibility: Look for risks, regressions, and verification gaps introduced by the change.
roles.stop_condition: The major keep-or-fix risks are documented.

roles.name: scorecard-writer
roles.responsibility: Produce a compact scorecard that a human or follow-on model can act on immediately.
roles.stop_condition: The next action is obvious without re-reviewing the whole artifact set.

collapse_condition: The change is small, acceptance criteria are binary, and a single reviewer can verify and score in one pass.
escalate_condition: The change touches multiple systems, has regression risk, or the result will be handed to a different team for follow-on work.

primitives: subagents when review surfaces should stay separate
subagents when review surfaces should stay separate
